category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tools collection; official Swiss File Knife site and SourceForge project describe one hundred command-line tools for file, text, network, archive, and system tasks: https://stahlworks.com/dev/swiss-file-knife.html
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project use Swiss File Knife: https://stahlworks.com/dev/swiss-file-knife.html
docs_sources: Official homepage is the primary documentation surface and includes command descriptions/downloads; no separate official docs domain found: https://stahlworks.com/dev/swiss-file-knife.html
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and SourceForge project provide downloads/source archives, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project lists categories Text Processing/File Managers/Grep and features including file, text, ftp/http server, network, archive, and checksum tools: https://sourceforge.net/projects/swissfileknife/
